findings.evidence: `rg -n "\b(show|change)\b" TauCeti/Geometry/Symplectic/ComplexModule.lean` reports `ComplexModule.lean:72:  rw [show z • v = (Complex.liftAux J.toLinearMap (by`; Mathlib has the named action fact at `mathlib/Mathlib/Algebra/Group/Action/Hom.lean:60: lemma compHom_smul_def` and documents `SMul.comp.smul` for `Module.compHom` at `mathlib/Mathlib/Algebra/Group/Action/Defs.lean:285`.
findings.fix: Replace the raw `show ... from rfl` step with a named rewrite such as `MulAction.compHom_smul_def`/`SMul.comp.smul` (or add a small local lemma for `Module.compHom` smul) before applying `Complex.liftAux_apply`.
findings.issue: `complexModule_smul_def` uses `rw [show z • v = ... from rfl]` to expose the induced `Module.compHom` action, so the public defining lemma depends on the internal definitional shape of the wrapper.

summary: One core proof still relies on raw definitional equality through the `Module.compHom` wrapper instead of a named action lemma, making it brittle under Mathlib refactors.
